companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Optional. Company names or domains to search. Leave empty to search by job title only (any company).

decisionMakerTitles.title: Decision maker job titles
decisionMakerTitles.description: Job titles to find. Leave empty to use the default list (Head of HR, CPO, VP People, Head of Engineering, CTO, etc.).

regions.title: Regions
regions.description: Optional. Restrict to these countries/regions (e.g. 'United States', 'United Kingdom'). Leave empty for global.

maxResultsPerCompany.title: Max results per company
maxResultsPerCompany.description: When companies are provided: cap per company. Ignored in title-only mode.

maxResults.title: Max results (title-only mode)
maxResults.description: When no companies provided: max profiles to fetch from LinkedIn (title-only search).
